name: SYM Shepherd
short_description: SYM Shepherd - Sam the German Shepherd is exploring a construction site. Help him perform tasks in this fun & challenging dog simulator.
detailed_description:
SYM Shepherd

Sam the German Shepherd is exploring a construction site

Help him perform tasks in this fun & challenging dog simulator

Some Features include:

Perform ALL of the green highlighted tasks, some are harder to find

Eat

Drink

Dig

Find a fellow dog somewhere on the construction site

Challenging platforming at the top of the site

Here is more info on what features and content a customer can expect to be included with their purchase of this Simulation/Platformer...

The Activities get more challenging as You progress

Teach the Dog to Eat, Drink, and Drink to increase Your Score

If You find the fellow dog somewhere on the construction site, they can be Your Friend

The Platforming action at the top of the site gets more and more challenging

Also ...

Can You find the "Easter Egg"?
